+                    "Stretch dough into a 12-inch round on a floured surface.",
+                    "Spread crushed tomatoes evenly over the dough.",

+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 12, RatingSum = 50
+            },
+            new Recipe
+            {
+                Id = 2, Title = "Chicken Tikka Masala", Category = "Indian",
+                Description = "Tender chicken pieces in a creamy, spiced tomato sauce.",
+                Ingredients = ["Chicken breast", "Yogurt", "Garam masala", "Tomato sauce", "Heavy cream", "Onion", "Garlic", "Ginger", "Cumin", "Turmeric"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Marinate chicken in yogurt, garam masala, and salt for at least 1 hour.",
+                    "Grill or broil chicken until lightly charred, then cut into pieces.",
+                    "Sauté onion, garlic, and ginger in oil until softened.",
+                    "Add spices and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.",
+                    "Pour in tomato sauce and simmer for 15 minutes.",
+                    "Stir in cream and chicken, cook for 5 more minutes."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 8, RatingSum = 36
+            },
+            new Recipe
+            {
+                Id = 3, Title = "Beef Tacos", Category = "Mexican",
+                Description = "Seasoned ground beef in crispy taco shells with fresh toppings.",
+                Ingredients = ["Ground beef", "Taco shells", "Lettuce", "Tomato", "Cheddar cheese", "Sour cream", "Taco seasoning", "Onion"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Brown ground beef with diced onion in a skillet.",
+                    "Add taco seasoning and water, simmer until thickened.",
+                    "Warm taco shells in the oven for 3 minutes.",
+                    "Fill shells with beef and top with lettuce, tomato, cheese, and sour cream."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 15, RatingSum = 60
+            },
+            new Recipe
+            {
+                Id = 4, Title = "Pad Thai", Category = "Thai",
+                Description = "Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, peanuts, and tangy sauce.",
+                Ingredients = ["Rice noodles", "Shrimp", "Eggs", "Bean sprouts", "Green onions", "Peanuts", "Lime", "Fish sauce", "Tamarind paste", "Sugar"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Soak rice noodles in warm water for 30 minutes, then drain.",
+                    "Mix fish sauce, tamarind paste, and sugar for the sauce.",
+                    "Stir-fry shrimp until pink, push to the side, scramble eggs.",
+                    "Add noodles and sauce, toss until well coated.",
+                    "Add bean sprouts and green onions, cook for 1 minute.",
+                    "Serve topped with crushed peanuts and lime wedges."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 10, RatingSum = 42
+            },
+            new Recipe
+            {
+                Id = 5, Title = "Spaghetti Carbonara", Category = "Italian",
+                Description = "A rich Roman pasta dish with eggs, cheese, and pancetta.",
+                Ingredients = ["Spaghetti", "Pancetta", "Eggs", "Parmesan cheese", "Black pepper", "Salt"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.",
+                    "Crisp pancetta in a skillet over medium heat.",
+                    "Whisk eggs with grated Parmesan and pepper in a bowl.",
+                    "Drain pasta, reserving some water, and add to pancetta pan off heat.",
+                    "Pour egg mixture over hot pasta and toss quickly to form a creamy sauce.",
+                    "Add pasta water a splash at a time if needed. Serve immediately."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 6, RatingSum = 27
+            },
+            new Recipe
+            {
+                Id = 6, Title = "Guacamole", Category = "Mexican",
+                Description = "Fresh and creamy avocado dip with lime and cilantro.",
+                Ingredients = ["Avocados", "Lime juice", "Cilantro", "Red onion", "Jalapeño", "Tomato", "Salt"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Halve and pit avocados, scoop flesh into a bowl.",
+                    "Mash to desired consistency with a fork.",
+                    "Stir in diced onion, tomato, jalapeño, cilantro, and lime juice.",
+                    "Season with salt and serve with tortilla chips."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 20, RatingSum = 88
+            }
+        ];
+        _nextId = 7;
+    }
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<string> GetCategories()
+    {
+        return _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().Order().ToList();
+    }
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Recipe> GetByCategory(string category)
+    {
+        return _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
+    }
+
+    public Recipe? GetById(int id)
+    {
+        return _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
+    }
+
+    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
+    {
+        var recipe = GetById(recipeId);
+        if (recipe is not null && stars is >= 1 and <= 5)
+        {
+            recipe.TotalRatings++;
+            recipe.RatingSum += stars;
+        }
+    }
+
+    public void AddRecipe(RecipeSubmission submission)
+    {
+        var recipe = new Recipe
+        {
+            Id = _nextId++,
+            Title = submission.Title,
+            Category = submission.Category,
+            Ingredients = submission.Ingredients
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList(),
+            Steps = submission.Steps
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList()
+        };
+        _recipes.Add(recipe);
+    }
+}

+                    "Add pasta water a splash at a time if needed. Serve immediately."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 6, RatingSum = 27
+            },
+            new Recipe
+            {
+                Id = 6, Title = "Guacamole", Category = "Mexican",
+                Description = "Fresh and creamy avocado dip with lime and cilantro.",
+                Ingredients = ["Avocados", "Lime juice", "Cilantro", "Red onion", "Jalapeño", "Tomato", "Salt"],
+                Steps = [
+                    "Halve and pit avocados, scoop flesh into a bowl.",
+                    "Mash to desired consistency with a fork.",
+                    "Stir in diced onion, tomato, jalapeño, cilantro, and lime juice.",
+                    "Season with salt and serve with tortilla chips."
+                ],
+                TotalRatings = 20, RatingSum = 88
+            }
+        ];
+        _nextId = 7;
+    }
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<string> GetCategories()
+    {
+        return _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().Order().ToList();
+    }
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Recipe> GetByCategory(string category)
+    {
+        return _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
+    }
+
+    public Recipe? GetById(int id)
+    {
+        return _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
+    }
+
+    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
+    {
+        var recipe = GetById(recipeId);
+        if (recipe is not null && stars is >= 1 and <= 5)
+        {
+            recipe.TotalRatings++;
+            recipe.RatingSum += stars;
+        }
+    }
+
+    public void AddRecipe(RecipeSubmission submission)
+    {
+        var recipe = new Recipe
+        {
+            Id = _nextId++,
+            Title = submission.Title,
+            Category = submission.Category,
+            Ingredients = submission.Ingredients
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList(),
+            Steps = submission.Steps
+                .Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries)
+                .ToList()
+        };
+        _recipes.Add(recipe);
+    }
+}
+

  - `Home.razor` — Homepage with category cards (static SSR)
  - `Categories.razor` — List of all categories (static SSR)
  - `CategoryDetail.razor` — Recipes in a category with avg ratings (static SSR)
  - `RecipeDetail.razor` — Full recipe with ingredients, steps, and star rating widget
  - `SubmitRecipe.razor` — Form to submit new recipes (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)
  - `StarRating.razor` — Click-to-rate 1–5 stars component (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)

**Render mode strategy:** Most pages use static SSR (read-only content). Only `StarRating` and `SubmitRecipe` opt into `InteractiveServer` for click handling and form interactivity.
